name: Spanish Rice (P/c)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain the rice.
2. Sauté onion in melted fat until tender.
3. Stir in the rice and remaining ingredients and mix.
4. Pressure cook at 15 lbs pressure for 10 minutes.
5. Reduce pressure with cool water.
6. Remove the bay leaf.
7. Add leftover meat if desired or serve as a meatless dish. Serves 4.
